data.title: Trump set to announce Kevin Warsh as Fed Chair, replacing Jerome Powell, a figure known in the financial world.
data.description: President Trump is preparing to reveal his selection for the new chair of the Federal Reserve, intending to replace Jerome H. Powell. Trump described the chosen individual as a widely recognized figure in the financial sector.

data.title: DentScribe launches AI voice perio charting to simplify processes, increase revenue. Operates like a clinical exam.
data.description: A company based in Sunnyvale, California, announced on January 30, 2026, that DentScribe has introduced a new AI Voice Perio Charting technology. This innovative system aims to streamline the perio charting process for dental professionals, making it more akin to a traditional clinical examination rather than a complicated voice command system. The technology is designed to allow practitioners to probe, speak, and progress efficiently through the charting procedure while maintaining a strong rapport with their patients. The AI Voice Perio Charting system is patent-pending and marks a significant advancement in simplifying dental charting tasks.

data.title: Raytron's thermal camera now in 20+ vehicle models to improve night driving safety with sensor fusion.
data.description: On January 30, 2026, in Las Vegas, Raytron, a prominent company specializing in infrared thermal imaging, revealed a shift in automotive perception architectures due to increased dangers associated with driving in darkness, low-visibility scenarios, and harsh weather conditions. Moving away from relying solely on "single sensor" systems, the industry is adapting to a more advanced approach known as "sensor fusion". This advancement aims to enhance safety by combining multiple sensors for a comprehensive data analysis.

data.title: Total votes in AB SKF changed due to share conversion, with 455,351,068 shares as of Jan 30, 2026.
data.description: In Gothenburg, Sweden on January 30, 2026, AB SKF has undergone a share conversion from Series A to Series B as outlined in the company's Articles of Association. Currently, there are 455,351,068 shares in AB SKF as of the mentioned date.

data.title: Nomination Committee proposes Karen Florschütz and Maximiliane Straub as new AB SKF board members. Florschütz is from Airbus.
data.description: In an announcement made on January 30, 2026, in Gothenburg, Sweden, SKF's Nomination Committee has put forth a proposal for the election of Karen Florschütz and Maximiliane Straub as new members of the AB SKF Board. Karen Florschütz, currently holding the position of Top Group Executive at Airbus, has a background as the Executive Vice President Connected. The recommendation highlights their potential roles in the company's leadership.
Bekaert provides update on share buyback program and liquidity agreement.
